puzzle.hint: This verse addresses all of humanity, reminding them of their inherent need for the Creator, who is free of all needs.
puzzle.arabic: ۞ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ أَنتُمُ ٱلْفُقَرَآءُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ وَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
puzzle.verseEn: O mankind, you are those in need of Allāh, while Allāh is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
